  VoidPush accepts anonymous PRs via void-cli.
  If you're submitting via GitHub directly, that's fine too.
  
  void pr --title "your title" --into main

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] `.gitignore` updated if new file types added
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour changed
